project_type: Java console turn-based RPG game, being migrated to libGDX MVC architecture
build_system: javac (no build tool - compile with javac *.java in src directory)
test_framework: None currently - validation via compilation only
verification_instructions: 1. Run javac on all .java files in src/ with proper package structure. 2. Verify zero compilation errors. 3. Verify no System.out or Scanner references in model/ or controller/ packages (only allowed in a temporary main class if needed for testing).
setup_instructions: Java is pre-installed. No additional setup needed. Compile with: javac -d out $(find src -name '*.java')
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Java 25 available (default). No test framework - validation by compilation. Must create package structure under src/.
contribution_requirements: Commit to branch 'phase2-decouple-logic'. Preserve all game mechanics exactly.
key_patterns: Current code: flat file structure, no packages, heavy System.out.println usage throughout all classes, Scanner-based input in Player.java and GameMain.java. Abstract class GameCharacter with abstract attack() method. Polymorphism via Enemy subclasses. Defense formula: reduction = defense/100.0, blocked = damage * reduction. Defense cap at 75. Mana starts at 75/100. +10 mana regen per turn.
directory_structure: src/ contains all 8 Java files in a flat structure. No packages currently. Target structure: src/model/, src/model/events/, src/controller/ with proper package declarations.
